source_book: The 4 Disciplines of Execution (2nd ed., 2021) — Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, Jim Huling, Scott Thele, Beverly Walker
_comment: Stage 4 adversarial pressure test. ≥3 should_trigger (EN/JP/zh-TW), ≥2 should_not_trigger lures (personal-misfire / cascade-misfire / member-misfire), ≥1 edge_case.

test_cases.prompt: Help me pick our team's Primary WIG. We have too many strategic goals on the table and I need to converge to one.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d1-team-primary-wig-selection; brainstorm candidate Battles, run the Importance × Feasibility 2x2, converge to ≤2 Primary WIG / ≤3 team WIGs total.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario EN — canonical 'help me pick our team's Primary WIG' + 'we have too many strategic goals' phrasing in description.

test_cases.prompt: チームの Primary WIG をどう選べばいい？戦略候補が 5 個くらいあって絞れない。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d1-team-primary-wig-selection; run candidate-Battles brainstorm + 2x2 filter in Japanese.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario JP — canonical 「チームの Primary WIG をどう選ぶ？」「戦略候補が多すぎてチームの焦点が決まらない」 phrasing.

test_cases.prompt: 幫我們團隊選 Primary WIG。我們有太多戰略目標想做，沒辦法收斂。
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d1-team-primary-wig-selection; run brainstorm + 2x2 in Traditional Chinese.
test_cases.notes: positive scenario zh-TW — canonical 「幫我們團隊選 Primary WIG」「我們有太多戰略目標想做」 phrasing in description.

test_cases.prompt: Help me define my personal WIG for this year. I want to ship a side project but also get promoted.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. Solo goal definition — should route to 4dx-d1-personal-wig-defining.
test_cases.notes: lure: personal-misfire — 'WIG' + 'too many goals' surface match but solo-individual scope.

test_cases.prompt: Our org just announced its Primary WIG. I lead 5 sub-teams and need to translate it into Team WIGs for each direct-report manager.
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. Org WIG already set; cascade context — should route to 4dx-d1-team-wig-cascade.
test_cases.notes: lure: cascade-misfire — team-leader-WIG phrasing but the upstream WIG is set, the task is downward translation not selection.

test_cases.prompt: My team's Primary WIG is 'reduce churn from 8% to 3% by Dec'. Can you explain what this means for me as an IC and what my role is?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Do NOT activate this skill. Team-member comprehension of an existing WIG — should route to a member-comprehension skill.
test_cases.notes: lure: member-misfire — Primary WIG mentioned but role is IC, WIG is already set, task is comprehension.

test_cases.prompt: Help me pick our team's Primary WIG. We only have 2 candidate Battles — does the 2x2 still apply, or should we just commit to one?
test_cases.expected_behavior: Activate 4dx-d1-team-primary-wig-selection AND advise that the 2x2 collapses to a 1-vs-1 Importance×Feasibility comparison (or skip the matrix and apply the 4 WIG criteria directly: alignment, measurable, finish-line, leader-owned). Cap ≤2 Primary still applies.
test_cases.notes: boundary: skill is built around a 2x2 filter; with only 2 candidates the matrix is degenerate. Skill should still activate (selection task) but recommend a degraded protocol.

pass_rate_breakdown: 7/7 — all 3 should_trigger PASS (direct match to canonical EN/JP/ZH phrasings in description), all 3 should_not_trigger PASS (description names personal-wig-defining, team-wig-cascade, and member-comprehension as explicit do-NOT routes), edge-01 (N=2 candidates) PASS at the activation layer — selection-task framing still wins, but description does not specify a degraded protocol when 2x2 collapses; that is a body-level handling concern flagged for follow-up.
description_issues_flagged: Description-level activation is clean, but the description prescribes a 2x2 filter without addressing the N=2 degenerate case. If skill body does not handle N=2 / N=1 explicitly, consider a one-line note in description ('also handles N≤2 via direct 4-WIG-criteria check').
ship_threshold_note: 100% to ship cleanly. ≥80% allowed only with explicit failure analysis. <80% must redo Stage 2 A2/E/B. should_not_trigger has zero tolerance.
